description_long: This is a tall, slim aluminum can with a predominantly white exterior, accented by bold orange and black graphics. The can features the brand name 'KILL CLIFF' in large, vertical orange letters outlined in black, running down the side. The top of the can is metallic silver with a standard pull tab, also colored orange, and visible ridges around the rim. Nutritional information and product details are printed in black on the back, along with orange highlights and a barcode. The bottom and top rims of the can are orange, providing a striking contrast to the white body. The overall appearance is sleek and modern, typical of energy or juice drinks found in urban environments.
description: A tall, slim white aluminum can with orange and black branding, metallic top, and orange pull tab.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the metallic silver top, orange pull tab, and rim details.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the vertical 'KILL CLIFF' branding and partial product information.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the full 'KILL CLIFF' logo and clean white surface with orange accents.
description_view_3: Angled rear view showing the nutritional information panel, barcode, and additional product text.
